notices.title: Urgent Payment Notice
notices.content:
CRITICAL NOTICE: The accounts department has identified the following student profiles with outstanding tuition balance. Please make arrangements to clear your dues immediately via the ERP Fee Collection portal or at the administrative office.

Students with Pending Balances:
• Hera Chandr — Outstanding: ₹0 (Paid: ₹0)
• Test Student — Outstanding: ₹1,500 (Paid: ₹0)

Failure to clear dues within the grace period may restrict access to the LMS study desks and weekly simulated exam evaluations. If you have already paid, please present your receipt to the administrator for verification.

waTemplates.name: Welcome Message
waTemplates.content: Dear {{1}}, welcome to Learner's Den. Your admission for batch {{2}} is confirmed.

waTemplates.name: Fee Reminder
waTemplates.content: Dear Parent, fee of INR {{1}} is due for {{2}}.

paymentSettings.instructions: Scan the QR code below or pay directly to the UPI ID above. Please enter the generated transaction ID to complete your fee collection.

institutionProfile.name: LEARNER'S DEN COACHING CENTER
institutionProfile.motto: Strive for Academic Excellence & Intellectual Mastery
institutionProfile.description: An Undertaking of DEN CORPORATION (Regd No: UDYAM-MN-04-0008737). Maintaining premium academic coaching standards advised by the Education Department, Government of Manipur.
institutionProfile.aboutUs: Learner's Den is Manipur's premier academic center for CBSE, COHSEM, JEE, and NEET preparation. Founded in 2016, we bridge the gap between school curriculum and competitive performance.
institutionProfile.vision: To cultivate a cohort of intellectually passionate, socially responsible, and academically stellar citizens.
institutionProfile.mission: To deliver top-pedagogy scientific, mathematical, and analytical training using interactive visual tools and customized attention, capped at 20 scholars per cohort.
institutionProfile.directorMessage: Welcome to Learner's Den. Our mission is deep conceptual understanding. We do not support rote learning. Instead, we build foundations that enable students to crack complex engineering and medical exams.
institutionProfile.chairmanMessage: We are committed to making premium quality coaching accessible to every child, regardless of financial barriers. Our expansive scholarship programs reflect this social dedication.
institutionProfile.history: Established in 2016 in Imphal East, Manipur, Learner's Den started as a small group of ambitious educators. Today, we manage two state-of-the-art campuses at Dewlahland and Lamlong, coaching hundreds of stellar board toppers.
institutionProfile.address: Dewlahland & Khurai Thoudam Leikai, Lamlong, Imphal
institutionProfile.examinationSchedule: Fortnightly Assessments, Unit Tests, and Mid-Term Mock Board Exams
institutionProfile.vacationDetails: Summer Vacation (June 15 - June 30), Ningol Chakkouba & Yaoshang break as per Government directives
institutionProfile.affiliationDetails: An Undertaking of DEN CORPORATION (Regd No: UDYAM-MN-04-0008737)
institutionProfile.recognitionDetails: Maintaining premium academic coaching standards advised by the Education Department, Government of Manipur.
institutionProfile.accreditationInfo: Accredited Grade 'A' Private Educational Coaching Center
institutionProfile.welcomeMessage: Welcome to Learner's Den Coaching Center. Your Gateway to Scholastic and Competitive Success.
institutionProfile.homepageBannerText: Premium Academic Coaching for CBSE & COHSEM Boards with Dedicated Competitive Focus.
institutionProfile.announcementText: Commencing from Thursday, 28th May, 2026 for CBSE & COHSEM Boards.
achievements: State Rank 2 COHSEM Class XII Science 2025
95+ Students scored 90%+ in CBSE Class X 2025
Recipient of Best Quality Coaching Center Imphal East 2024

upcomingEvents.title: Scholarship Admission Test (SAT)
upcomingEvents.desc: Avail up to 100% discount on Class XI & XII tuition fees.

upcomingEvents.title: Class XI Orientation Program
upcomingEvents.desc: Mandatory interactive onboarding for newly admitted students and their parents.

lecturerEvaluations.comments: Excellent demonstration of kinematics and rotational mechanics! Engaging, interactive, beautifully explained.
Dr. Ramesh has brilliant teaching clarity. He kept everyone awake and engaged throughout.
Very solid and experienced educator. Covers difficult derivations stepwise.
